records.subject: Announced by CFH, on behalf of Cathay II Wind Power Holdings CO., Ltd. of its intention to invest in Greater Changhua SW Offshore Wind Farm with Orsted
records.fund_name:

and conditions of issuance shall also be indicated, e.g., dividend yield,
etc.):
To acquire (a) 45% of the ordinary and preferred shares
(the preferred shares are designed for specific corporate
governance matters and do not have any special financial
terms) in the capital of Greater Changhua SW Holdings
Ltd., and the corresponding 45% of shareholder loans made
to Greater Changhua SW Holdings Ltd. and/or Greater
Changhua Offshore Wind Farm SW Ltd..
records.commitment_amount_raw:
Amount, unit price, and total monetary amount of the transaction:
For the underlying assets as abovementioned, to invest
in a sum amount up to NTD 27.819 billion for payment of
the consideration agreed under the Share Purchase
Agreement.
